mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorite (user_id, target_id, type) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetId}, #{type})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND type = #{type}
mapper.select: SELECT f.id, f.target_id, f.type, CASE WHEN f.type = 'scenic' THEN s.name ELSE fd.name END AS name, CASE WHEN f.type = 'scenic' THEN s.cover_image ELSE fd.cover_image END AS cover_image FROM favorite f LEFT JOIN scenic_spot s ON f.type = 'scenic' AND f.target_id = s.id LEFT JOIN food fd ON f.type = 'food' AND f.target_id = fd.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
